comments.body:
Thank you for reporting this.

The root cause is a preexisting bug for `yield_now`, which I just opened an issue for in #7210. However, #7185 expanded this bug to also apply to anything using coop, which is why you now see it with `Mutex`.

title: Calling `lock().await` on `tokio::sync::Mutex` gets stuck after locking it 128 times in a loop
